calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Aug-19-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR. Lavon Granger
Appearances:
Michael Lincheid, Esq. for Plaintiff Elanda Johnson, the guardian ad litem and Romondo Johnson, a minor also present.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Medical expenses of $5,041.00.
Reimbursement of legal/Costs to attorney : $295.85
Attorney's fees: $1,433.15.
A net balance of $5,030.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual, South Gate Ave., Daly City Acct. No. 019 60000 6506 546.
Order signed in open court.
Counsel to prepare an Order for the Deposit for signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2003 Continued To Oct-03-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
